command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const t=fs.readFileSync('docs/install-npm.md','utf8'); const a=(c,m)=>{if(!c)throw new Error(m)}; a(t.includes('npm i -g @heurema/pactum'),'missing: npm i -g @heurema/pactum'); a(t.includes('npx @heurema/pactum'),'missing: npx @heurema/pactum'); a(t.includes('Windows'),'missing: Windows'); a(/Alpine|musl/.test(t),'missing: Alpine or musl'); a(t.includes('PACTUM_NPM_CACHE'),'missing: PACTUM_NPM_CACHE'); a(t.includes('.cache/pactum'),'missing: .cache/pactum'); a(t.includes('github.com/heurema/pactum/releases'),'missing: github.com/heurema/pactum/releases');"
